title: Section 15
content: Nothing in this Act shall be construed to impair the operation 1[of any enactment] for the time being in force, respecting the authority of an Advocate General 2*** to act with respect to any charity 3[or of the Official Trustees Act, 1913] respecting the vesting of property in trust for a charitable purpose in an Official Trustee.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 58 of 1960, s. 3 and the Second Schedule, for of section III of the Statue 53, George III, Chapter 155, or of any other enactment. 2. The words at a Presidency omitted by s. 3 and the Second Schedule, ibid. 3. Subs. by s. 3 and the Second Schedule, ibid., for or of sections 8, 9, 10, and 11 of Act No. XVII of 1864 (An Act to constitute an office of Official Trustee).
